sections.paragraph:
Ἀρτεμύλλα, ας Artemilla, wife of the governor in Ephesus AcPl Ha 2, 12 al. (mentioned 12 times).

AcPl Ha AcPl Ha = Acts of Paul, PHamb—List 1

  1. al. =alibi (elsewhere), aliter (otherwise), alii (others)

Arndt, William ; Danker, Frederick W. ; Bauer, Walter: A Greek-English Lexicon of the New Testament and Other Early Christian Literature. 3rd ed. Chicago : University of Chicago Press, 2000, S. 135
